{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no teem Lewiteem
(tappe zitti eezeltt)/ ka teem
ne bij to Dshiwokli nest/ nedß
kahdu zittu Rihku/ kas pee ta
Ammata peederreja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo pehz Dahwida pehde-
jeem Wahrdeem tappe Lewja
Behrni skattiti/ kas dividefmitß
Gaddus un wairak wezzi bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka teem bij feinim Aäro-
na Behrnu Rohkas stahweht/
ta KUNGA Namma Pagalmê
kalpoht/ un par teem Schktr-
steem/ un par to Schkistifcha-
nu wiſſu twehtu Leetu/ un par
to Kalposchanas Darbu Deewa
Nammâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un par tahm Deetwa
preefschliktahm Maischm/ un
par teem Kwretchu-Milteem pee
Eedamo-Uppureeim/ un par tahm
neraudsetahm Karrafchahm/ un
par tahm Pannahm/ un par
tahm zeptahm Leetahn/ un par
wiſſadu Swarru un Mehru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un iſrihtu stahweht/ to
KUNGU teikt un flaweht/ ta
patt arridsan Wakara.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pee wiſſas Dedsamo-
Uppuru Uppurefchanas Sweb-
deenaß/ jaunõs Mehneschõß un
eezeitõs Svehtkõß/ ihstenã Pul-
kã pehz winnu Teefu/ weenu-
mehr preefsch ta KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ka tee Wakti turretu
preefsch Sa-eeschanas/ Telts un
tahs twehtas Weetas/ un winnu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N schi btja Aärona
Behrnu Kahrtu. Aäro-
na Behrni bija Na-
dabs un Abijus/ Eeleasars un
Ihtamars.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Nadabs un Abijus
nomirre preefsch fawa Tehwa
Azzim/ un teem Behrnu ne bi-
ja/ un Eeleasars un Ihtamars
btja par Preestereein.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids nodallija
tohß/ Zadaku no Eeleasara Behr-
neem/ un Akimeleku no Ihtama-
ra Behrneem/ pehz winnu Put-
tu pee winnu Kalposchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Eeleasara Behrnu tap-
pe wairak atrasti/ kas wihrisß
Wirfneeki bija ne ka Ihtamara
Behrni/ ka tee pee fawas Kalpo-
chanas tappe nodallitt/ no Ee-
leasara Behrneem bija fetchpadef-
mits Wirfneeki to Tehwo Nam-
mu/ bet no Ihtamara Behr-
neem bija afonxi Wirfneeki pehz
fawu Tehwu Nammeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee nodallija tohs zaue
Meslofchanu/ tik labbi schohs ka
winnuß/ tapehz ka tee par Wir-
neckeem bija twehta Weeta/ un
par Wir+neckeem preefschDeewa/
no Eeleasara un Ihtamara Behr-
neem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Semajus Netancëta
Dehls tas Skrihweris/ no teem
Lewi-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
